mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.author_account, a.article_type, a.title, a.publish_date, a.content, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.create_time FROM article_info a INNER JOIN article_collection ac ON a.id = ac.article_id WHERE ac.user_account = #{userAccount} AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_account = #{userAccount}
